mekong.name: 12,7e Lunch buffet 27/10 Lunch buffet includes salad bar, tea/coffee and desert
2. Phở bò tái nạm - beef pho soup Traditional vietnamese pho rice noodles soup with beef fillet and brisket, prepared in southern style
3. Bún thịt xào contains peanuts Lemongrass stir-fried pork tenderloin served with rice noodles, roasted peanuts, green salad, pickled carrot and daikon, and sweet fish sauce

4. Hủ tiếu chay- vegan soup contains peanuts, celery, soya, wheat Hủ tiếu tapioca noodles in vegetable broth, topped w/ roasted peanuts, mushroom, bean curd, fried vegan wonton, soy sausage, fried onions, and sliced tofu
5. Vegan phở Rice noodles in vegetable broth, topped w/ vegan chicken, mushroom, tofu, mung sprouts and herbs
